creator: regisr@regix.com
text:
Handbook 12.5.5.3. SCSI drives:

Seagate STD 18000N

The boot message identifier for this drive is 
"<ARCHIVE Python 04687-XXX 6580> Removable Sequential Access SCSI-2 device"
This is a DAT DDS-2 drive.
Native capacity is 4GB when using 120m tapes. 
This drive supports hardware data compression.
Switch 4 controls MRS (Media Recognition System). 
MRS tapes have stripes on the transparent leader. 
Switch 4 OFF enables MRS. Switch 4 ON disables MRS.

Parity is controlled by switch 5. Switch 5 ON to enable parity control.
Compression is enabled with Switch 6 OFF. It is possible to override 
compression with the SCSI MODE SELECT command (see the mt command).

Data transfer rate is 800kB/s.

Fix: 

Copy the documentation if you think that this can help someone...
How-To-Repeat: Buy a drive ? ;-)))
